summary: Frontend-only UI testing of iteration 2 CASNAGGI redesign additions (hero carousel, /events page, expanded board of 5 trustees, about-registration strip, ETHICS objects, updated impact stats, new email/website/RC in footer & contact). All 50+ assertions passed on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). 51 images scanned across all 8 pages, 0 broken. No console/page errors detected.

hero_carousel.autoplay_setInterval_wired: confirmed in code (6000ms); manual test timing was inconclusive due to 500ms AnimatePresence race, but carousel did advance automatically in subsequent observation

events_page.filter_chips_count: 8 (All + 7 unique categories from EVENTS data; spec said 6 but data has 7 unique categories: Humanitarian Care, Health on Wheels, Youth Empowerment, Good Governance, Grassroots Network, Women Empowerment, Organizational Milestone)

critical_code_review_comments: Events.jsx lines 17-18: `rest` variable is computed but never used in render (grid uses `filtered.slice(1)` directly). Dead code — safe to remove.

HeroCarousel autoplay interval (6s) is not paused/reset when user clicks prev/next/dot. UX nit: after manual interaction, next autoplay can fire within milliseconds if the 6s boundary is near. Consider resetting the interval on user interaction.
About.jsx trustee photos: 3 of 5 intentionally reuse existing photos as placeholders (documented by main agent). Fine for this iteration but flag before go-live.

Events page spec stated '6 categories' but data has 7 unique categories → 8 chips including All. Verify intent; if 6 is canonical, consolidate 'Grassroots Network' or 'Organizational Milestone' into broader buckets.

data/content.js is approaching 465 lines and mixes ORG, MEDIA, HERO_SLIDES, NAV, PROGRAMS, TRUSTEES, EVENTS, etc. Split into /data/org.js, /data/programs.js, /data/events.js for maintainability if it grows further.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 adds: HeroCarousel.jsx (embla-carousel-react, autoplay 6s, testids hero-slide-0..3, hero-prev, hero-next, hero-dot-0..3, home-hero), Events.jsx at /events (testids events-filters, events-filter-<slug>, events-featured, events-grid, event-<slug>, events-cta, events-contact-btn), About registration strip (about-registration), expanded trustees (trustee-0..4), ETHICS now objects with title+body (ethic-0..6), Footer has footer-website testid and RC line. Mobile menu uses same nav-events testid as desktop — two elements with same testid, so use .locator('[data-testid=nav-events]').nth(1) or target inside mobile-menu wrapper when testing mobile nav specifically.
